nodes.name: Poospiza
nodes.summary: Poospiza（Poospiza）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联10种鸟类，如Slaty-backed hemispingus、Rufous-browed hemispingus、Bolivian warbling finch等10种鸟类。

nodes.name: Rufous-breasted warbling finch
nodes.summary: The rufous-breasted warbling finch (Poospiza rubecula) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is endemic to Peru. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical dry forests and subtropical or tropical high-altitude shrubland. It is threatened by habitat loss. References External links BirdLife Species Factsheet.
nodes.shortSummary: The rufous-breasted warbling finch (Poospiza rubecula) is a species of bird in the family Thraupidae. It is endemic to Peru.
